mapper.sql: m.id, m.member_id, m.coupon_id, m.coupon_name, m.coupon_type, DATE_FORMAT(m.receive_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as receiveTime, DATE_FORMAT(m.expire_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as expireTime, m.use_status, m.used_order_id, DATE_FORMAT(m.used_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as usedTime, (select nickname from user_info where userId = m.member_id) as memberName, (select phone from user_info where userId = m.member_id) as memberMobile, (select order_no from pt_private_order where id = m.used_order_id) as usedOrderNo

where.if: AND m.member_id IN (select userId from user_info where nickname LIKE concat('%',#{memberKeyword},'%') or phone LIKE concat('%',#{memberKeyword},'%'))

mapper.select: select from mk_member_coupon m where m.id = #{value}
mapper.insert: insert into mk_member_coupon (`member_id`, `coupon_id`, `coupon_name`, `coupon_type`, `receive_time`, `expire_time`, `use_status`) values (#{memberId}, #{couponId}, #{couponName}, #{couponType}, now(), date_add(now(), interval #{validDays} day), 0)
mapper.select: select count(*) from mk_member_coupon where coupon_id = #{value}
